metadata.description: Research intelligence topics for Changeis Inc. Drives automated monitoring, daily briefs, and opportunity tracking.

changes: Updated T03 (DHS CISA Recompetes): Added $18-20B CISA IDIQ successor vehicle details; updated PDNS value from $128.5M to $105M (corrected); added CDM-DEFEND successor contract tracking

Updated T04 (DHS Enterprise IT): Expanded to include CBP C5I C4I recompete ($50-100M), CBP Cyber Security Operations Support recompete ($100M+), ICE ITSS recompete ($201M), ICE Enterprise Support Services ($63.9M)
Added T15 (TSA IT and Operations): New critical topic for TSA NEXUS ($100M+), TEAS ($50-100M), FOCUS ($100M+) contracts all due Q2-Q3 FY2026
Added T16 (USCG Cybersecurity and C5I): New high priority topic for Coast Guard Cyber Command IOM contract and CG-C5I sustainment opportunities

Updated T07 (DOGE Impact): Refined notes — DOGE confirmed sunset July 4, 2026; 10,000+ contracts terminated; fixed-price and cost-justification requirements persist; IT consulting >$10M requires DOGE approval still
Updated T08 (Federal Cloud/Zero Trust): Added CISA IDIQ as Zero Trust delivery vehicle
Updated T10 (GSA MAS): OASIS legacy ended; OASIS+ Phase 2 open enrollment as of Jan 2026 — no formal deadline; updated as key vehicle
Updated T13 (FAR Overhaul/RFO): Corrected framing — FAR Part 12 commercial-first, not Part 10; added CSO and OTA references
Updated T14 (Competitive Intel): Added Synergy as USCG incumbent; noted CACI as CBP C4I incumbent; Leidos as CBP Cyber incumbent
Updated Army MAPS: T17 added — RFP officially issued April 6, 2026 (confirmed live); offers due May 1, 2026; awards September 2026
Updated T06 (Federal AI Policy): Added White House National AI Framework (March 20, 2026); OPM AI Workforce programs; TRUMP AMERICA AI Act
Removed T11 (CMMC 2.0): Lowered priority — frequency changed to monthly, notes updated with Oct 31 2026 hard gate; retained but de-prioritized

topics.name: FAA ATEPS-II Task Orders
topics.notes: IDIQ ceiling: Noblis $709.1M (awarded Dec 2024), SAIC $629.8M (awarded Jul 2025). Task order competition is active battleground through 2035. SETIS contract also active for additional FAA engineering task orders. Primary teaming opportunity for Changeis. Multiple eFAST recompetes also active in 2026 ($33M NextGen Initiative TO, $128.4M I&O Services, others).

topics.name: FAA NAS Modernization
topics.notes: Broader FAA air traffic organization spend beyond ATEPS-II. Monitor NextGen and SWIM program signals. Emerging areas: UAM/AAM integration, UAS UTM, autonomous flight — all generating new SETIS task orders. eFAST vehicle also active for many FAA support categories.

topics.name: DHS CISA Recompetes and New IDIQ Vehicle
topics.notes: Two parallel tracks: (1) ~24 FY2026 CISA task order recompetes including $321M DEFEND F (7 bidders), $271M Program Mgmt Support (3 bidders), $105M PDNS (6 bidders), $20M Integrated Ops Div, $12.6M PERT Support. (2) Major new vehicle: $18-20B CISA IDIQ (GSA-assisted), covering 5 service areas + products, replaces CDM DEFEND structure; RFP expected mid-2026, award Feb 2027. All DEFEND task orders extended to April 30, 2027. Small business set-asides expected in SA5 (Solution Development) and PA1 (Products). High BD priority — pursue teaming NOW.

topics.name: DHS Component IT Recompetes — CBP, ICE, FLETC
topics.notes: Active recompetes: CBP C4I Systems (CACI incumbent, $50-100M, Alliant 2, award Q4 FY2026, sol. released Mar 25, 2026); CBP Cyber Security Ops Support (Leidos incumbent, $100M+, award Q2-Q3 FY2026); CBP Tech Service Desk (Patriot LLC incumbent, $100M+, STARS III/8a, sol. ~May 2026). ICE recompetes: $201M ITSS (12 bidders), $63.9M Enterprise Support Services (14 bidders), $35.3M SEVP IT/PMO (6 bidders), $10.1M Internet Research & Data Analytics (3 bidders — low competition). $191B+ DHS funding from One Big Beautiful Bill creates expanded pipeline.

topics.name: FMCSA Motus System Support
topics.notes: Phase 1 (supporting companies) live December 2025 at motus.dot.gov. Phase 2 (all users: carriers, brokers, freight forwarders) rolling out through 2026. Monitor for IT support, integration, and enhancement opportunities as platform scales. Proposed rulemaking estimated March 2026. This is a multi-year O&M and enhancement opportunity.

topics.name: Federal AI Policy, Governance, and Workforce
topics.notes: White House released National Policy Framework for AI on March 20, 2026 — nonbinding but shapes federal AI legislation. EO 14365 (Dec 2025) directing review of state AI laws. OPM launching: US Tech Force (1,000 AI/cyber fellows/year), Project Management Fellows (250, Spring 2026), Data Science Fellows (250, Spring 2026). GSA GSAR 552.239-7001 comment period closed April 3, 2026 — monitor final rule. Cleared AI professional talent gap acute. Changeis staffing + AI delivery positioning is primary opportunity.

topics.name: DOGE Contracting Impact and Post-DOGE Landscape
topics.notes: DOGE sunsets July 4, 2026. Over 10,000 contracts terminated/descoped; 273 contracts ($5.1B ceiling) terminated in a 4-week window (as of Feb 2026). Functions absorbing into OMB/OPM permanently. IT consulting contracts >$10M still require DOGE approval. Advisory services >$1M require approval. Fixed-price preference and public cost-justification requirements persist post-DOGE. FY2026 budget INCREASED spending vs FY2025 in most categories — contradicts narrative of permanent cuts. DoD absorbed $11.1B in DOGE-related efficiency cuts. Monitor for re-solicitation of terminated contracts.

topics.name: Federal Cloud Migration and Zero Trust
topics.notes: DoD FY2027 Zero Trust deadline active. JWCC Next active. Air Force Cloud One $88M Oracle task order Feb 2026. New CISA $18-20B IDIQ includes zero trust and CDM capabilities as core service areas. FCEB agencies under pressure to achieve ZT milestones. Monitor civilian agency ZT implementation contracts.

topics.name: Government AI/ML Implementation
topics.notes: Agencies transitioning AI pilots to full production through 2026. OPM US Tech Force (1,000 fellows/year) and Data Science Fellows program creating AI demand at agencies. Cleared AI professional talent gap is acute — Changeis staffing + delivery positioning opportunity. White House AI Framework (March 2026) sets nonbinding governance posture; EO 14365 coordinates federal AI policy.

topics.name: GSA OASIS+ and Contract Vehicles
topics.notes: OASIS (legacy) fully expired — ordering ended Dec 2024 (SB/8a) and Mar 2025 (Unrestricted). OASIS+ Phase 2 entered open enrollment January 2026 with no formal deadline — draft scorecards published. Six IDIQ pools: Total SB, WOSB, SDVOSB, HUBZone, 8(a), Unrestricted. 5-year base + 5-year option. Changeis should pursue OASIS+ on-ramp if not already on vehicle. STARS III active for 8(a) set-aside CBP task orders.

topics.name: CMMC 2.0 Compliance and DoD Cybersecurity
topics.notes: CMMC Level 1/2 self-attestations now in DoD solicitations. Hard gate for all DoD awards by Oct 31, 2026. 8(a) set-aside DoD contracts >$20M subject to compliance audit as of Jan 2026 (DOGE memo). Verify Changeis compliance posture.

topics.name: SAM.gov Opportunity Monitoring — Core NAICS
topics.notes: Broad daily sweep across Changeis core NAICS. Feeds VM2 daily brief. Separate from named-program monitoring. Priority filter: DHS, DOT, Army, GSA agencies. DOGE contract re-solicitations may create short-fuse opportunities — flag any newly released solicitations in terminated contract categories.

topics.name: Revolutionary FAR Overhaul (RFO) and Acquisition Reform
topics.notes: EO 14265 targets defense acquisition modernization. FAR Part 12 commercial-first mandate — agencies must prove commercial solution cannot meet need before custom dev. CSO and OTA pathways expanding. Changes Changeis proposal strategy: lead with commercial-off-the-shelf solutions first, custom second. Fixed-price contracting preference reinforced.

topics.name: Competitive Intelligence — Large Integrators and Incumbents
topics.notes: Key incumbents to track: Noblis (FAA ATEPS-II $709M), SAIC (FAA ATEPS-II $629M), CACI (CBP C4I C5I, CBP ITSS; also $287M Army IPPS-A), Leidos (CBP Cyber Security Ops $100M+), Synergy (USCG CG-C5I $32M task order Mar 2026), Booz Allen (2x CDM DEFEND groups). BAH projecting low-double-digit civilian revenue contraction FY2026 — teaming opportunity. Monitor for subcontracting/teaming solicitations on all incumbents above.

topics.name: TSA IT Contracts — NEXUS, TEAS, FOCUS
topics.notes: Three active TSA IT procurements all due Q2-Q3 FY2026: (1) NEXUS — IT Ops & Maintenance, >$100M, FFP, performance through May 2031, Springfield VA — broad O&M scope including cloud, AI, data analytics, telecom; (2) TEAS — Enterprise Engineering & Architecture, $50-100M, FFP, new tech integration and design; (3) FOCUS — Field Ops & Customer Support, >$100M, FFP, helpdesk/IT specialist support for ~85,000 TSA personnel at ~500 sites. All new to Changeis BD pipeline — high priority given DHS focus area.

topics.name: USCG Cybersecurity and C5I Digital Transformation
topics.notes: Active opportunity: USCG Cyber Command Integrated Operations Management (IOM) — published March 2026 on DHS APFS, covers CG-CYBER cyberspace operations, NIPRNET/SIPRNET, analytical and technical SME support. Recent award: Synergy $32M task order for CG-C5I sustainment (Mar 2026) — Synergy is likely incumbent to track for teaming. Also monitor for Arctic Security Cutter IT support contracts (11 ASCs under construction, awarded Feb 2026).

topics.name: Army MAPS — $50B IDIQ
topics.notes: RFP officially issued April 6, 2026 on SAM.gov. Offers due May 1, 2026. $50B IDIQ, 10-year PoP (5-year base + 5-year option). Consolidates RS3 and ITES-3S vehicles. Covers: R&D, engineering, logistics, operations, management/advisory, emerging IT, cybersecurity, data analytics, enterprise systems. Awards expected September 2026. Army Contracting Command-Aberdeen Proving Ground (ACC-APG) / CECOM issuing authority. Primary domains align to Changeis capabilities. CRITICAL ACTION: Begin proposal teaming and preparation NOW — offers due May 1.
topics.action_required: URGENT: Offers due May 1, 2026. Begin proposal preparation and teaming immediately.
